Zt. gt. * t a * H , TT^^T ^Rf^f -- 3 of 6 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th January, 2011 G S.R. 38(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 28 A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949), the Central Government hereby constitutes a Quality Review Board consisting of the following persons, namely :— (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) Shri R. Bandyopadhyay C-l/41, Pandara Park, New Delhi-110 003 Shri A. N. Chatterji, ex-Dy. Comptroller & Auditor General of India 11B-1, Peak Tower Highland Park, 1925, Chakgaria, Kolkata-700 094 Smt. Renuka Kumar, Joint Secretary, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, A Wing, Shastri Bhawan, Dr. R. P. Road, New Delhi - 1 1 0 001 Mrs. Usha Narayanan, Executive Director, Securities and Exchange Board of India, SEBI Bhawan, C4-A, G Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra, East Mumbai-400 051 Ms. Usha Shankar, Director-General (Commercial), Office of the Comptroller & Auditor General of India, Deen Dayal Upadhyay Marg, New Delhi- 110 002 Shri Sathyan David, General Manager, Department of Banking Supervision, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, World Trade Centre 1, Cuffe Parade, Colaba, Mumbai-400 005 Chairman Member Member Member Member Member 4 -- 4 of 6 -- [*FT ll—W^ 3(i)] *IKcT ^T WT7 : sraraK'7! Nominees of the Council (7) (8) (9) (10) (11) Shri Amarjit Chopra President, Institute of Chartered Accountants of India, ICAI Bhawan, P.B. No. 7100, Indrapratha Marg, New Delhi-110 002 Shri G. Ramaswamy M/s. G. Ramaswamy & Co., GR Chamber 66, Logamanya Street [W] R.S. Puram, Coimbatore 641002, Shri Sanjeev Maheshwari C/002, Vishal Apartments, Sir M.V. Road, Andheri (East), MUMBAI-400 069. Shri Sumantra Guha 16/1, Girish Vidya Ratna Lane, KOLKATA - 700 009. • Shri Vijay Kumar Garg 1533/35, Baba Harish Chand Marg, Fourth Crossing, Chandpole Bazar, JAIPUR-302 001. Member Member Member Member Member 2. The terms and condition of service and allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Quality Review Board shall be governed by the Chartered Accountants Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and allowances of the Chairperson and members of the Board Rules, 2006. This notification shall take effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No.l/15/2010-PI] Dr. T. V. SOMANATHAN, Jt.
